rationale: The cited paper directly studies intention follow-through over time for psychologically new products, showing time-decaying intention-behavior gaps, which is closely aligned with the citing paper’s stated gap that timed intent research is scarce and its goal of improving whether/when adoption prediction. Given this strong topical and theoretical overlap (both are JMR intention-to-adoption timing work on new technologies), this is plausibly more than an incidental mention and should be reviewed in full.
